# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  nsgName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "DevTeamAccessNSG"
    metadata:
      description: The name of the Network Security Group.
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources.
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: 2020-11-01
    name: "[parameters('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: AllowRDPFromAny
          properties:
            description: Allow RDP (3389) access from any source for remote development.
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "3389"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: AllowSSHFromAny
          properties:
            description: Allow SSH (22) access from any source for remote development.
            priority: 110
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "22"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: AllowHTTPFromAny
          properties:
            description: Allow HTTP (80) access from any source for web development.
            priority: 120
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: AllowHTTPSFromAny
          properties:
            description: Allow HTTPS (443) access from any source for secure web development.
            priority: 130
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
